The '''''Scylla''''' was an [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft]] in the service of [[Viraxo Industries]]. It was guarding [[Industrial complex|Industrial Complex]] [[VXO-33274]], and was destroyed by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] pilot [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] in the [[YT-2000 light freighter/Legends|YT-2000]] ''[[Otana/Legends|Otana]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
